name: 2 Drawer Decorative Fabric Box Charcoal - Brightroom: Rectangle, Paper & Polyester, Spot Clean, 6"x10"x13"
description:
Organize your desktop or vanity in style with this 2-Drawer Decorative Fabric Box from Brightroom™. This 2-drawer rectangular box is the perfect size to hold anything from jewelry to toiletries. The slide-out design makes it easy to pull open, and the solid charcoal color pair well with a wide variety of decor styles and color schemes—plus, it features a white paper insert at the front for easy labeling.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
